name: Applesauce Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onions and butter in a deep, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until onion is tender.
3. Add lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, catsup, applesauce, and salt.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 7 minutes or until sauce is bubbly. Makes 3 cups
